title: Telipogon andinus
taxonomy: Telipogon andinus is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which encompasses the majority of orchid species. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Epidendroideae subfamily, to which Telipogon andinus belongs. The genus Telipogon is a part of the Epidendroideae subfamily and is known for its diverse range of orchid species. Telipogon andinus, as a specific species, can be identified by its unique characteristics and is a part of the Andean region's diverse orchid flora. The classification of Telipogon andinus is further refined by its scientific name, which includes the binomial nomenclature used to identify species.
